description.content: Access market data, manage accounts, and trade Binance Options.

exec: // only sign if a signature param was declared and we have a secret
const cryptoKey = await crypto.subtle.importKey('raw', keyData, { name: 'HMAC', hash: 'SHA-256' }, false, ['sign']);
const signatureBuffer = await crypto.subtle.sign('HMAC', cryptoKey, msgData);
if (Array.isArray(value) || (typeof value === 'object' && value !== null)) return JSON.stringify(value);

item.name: Cancel all Option orders on specific symbol (TRADE)
Cancel All Option Orders By Underlying (TRADE)

query.description: User-defined order ID cannot be repeated in pending orders
User-defined order ID; cannot be duplicated among open orders.
Trade id to fetch from. Default gets most recent trades, e.g 4611875134427365376

Max 1 (only single leg supported), list of legs parameters in JSON; example: eapi/v1/block/order/create?orders=[{"symbol":"BTC-210115-35000-C", "price":"100","quantity":"0.0002","side":"BUY","type":"LIMIT"}]
If specified, returns the specific block trade associated with the blockOrderMatchingKey
Asset type, only support USDT  as of now
Return the recordId and subsequent data, the latest data is returned by default

item.name: Get Auto-Cancel All Open Orders (Kill-Switch) Config (TRADE)
Set Auto-Cancel All Open Orders (Kill-Switch) Config (TRADE)

query.description: Countdown time in milliseconds (ex. 1,000 for 1 second). 0 to disable the timer. Negative values (ex. -10000) are not accepted. Minimum acceptable value is 5,000
MMP frozen time in milliseconds, if set to 0 manual reset is required
